title: ct_shop_config
description: Singleton-style shop configuration: customizable production pipeline (Printavo-style board columns).

fields.description: Single row e.g. 'Default' or tenant name.
Ordered array: [{ "code": "ART_PREP", "label": "Art", "color": "#6366F1", "sortOrder": 10, "kanbanColumn": 1 }, ...]. Power Apps loads via ParseJSON or use child table ct_stage_definition instead.
Templates emitted when GATE_PASSED: [{ "type": "ART_PREP", "title": "Prepare artwork", "defaultStageCode": "ART_PREP" }, ...]. Node/PA merge with print-method expansion.

notes: Prefer one row per environment; secure write to admin / maker only.
If JSON in Dataverse is awkward, use ct_stage_definition table instead and drop ct_pipeline_json.
